description: A detail of a decorative ceiling or dome spandrel featuring ornamental grotesque-style painting. At the center, a colorful parrot perches on a small ornamental vase or urn. Surrounding it are delicate floral scrollwork patterns, small birds, and botanical motifs painted on a light background. At the top center, a cherub or putto head with garlands looks down. The border features geometric patterns in blue and gold. The painting is partially aged with some wear visible on the plaster surface.
